title: Your AI Assistant

data.label: Hotel Data
data.welcomeMessage: Hello! I am your Hotel AI Assistant. I can help you analyze room bookings, guest requests, and operational data. Type your own prompt or select one of the suggested prompts to get started.
suggestedPrompts: How many room reservations are there for today?
Summarize the guest feedback and ratings from the last 7 days.

knowledge.label: Hotel Knowledge
knowledge.welcomeMessage: I can help with hotel policies, amenities, and standard operating procedures. Type your own prompt or select one of the suggested prompts to get started.
suggestedPrompts: Tell me about the knowledge base.
Tell me about the hotel's amenities and wellness facilities.
